title: Browser tab names have numbers
excerpt:
Hi all 
For ages now I have noticed that the browser displays a number in brackets for the name. This only happens for Monday.com and no other websites I have open. It is frustrating as the tab view of a name is very lim…

posts.author: MaxLogic_Lisa (Lisa Armstrong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all

For ages now I have noticed that the browser displays a number in brackets for the name. This only happens for Monday.com and no other websites I have open. It is frustrating as the tab view of a name is very limited and to have these displayed it is frustrating. In MS Edge we cannot rename the browser tab.

Any ideas please.

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Lisa,

Does the number fluctuate? Your UI looks different than mine, but my guess is the number is showing how many unread bell notifications you have in Monday.

posts.author: MaxLogic_Lisa (Lisa Armstrong)
posts.cookedHtml: Amazing thank you. As soon as i clicked on the Notification the number disappeared. Do you know if there is anyway to turn this off without turning off the notifications?

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t - sorry. I looked through admin settings and my profile settings and didn’t see anything that would pertain to this

posts.author: MaxLogic_Lisa (Lisa Armstrong)
posts.cookedHtml: No problem. Your initial response was a great help thank you.
